_schema: Per-version post-update entries, surfaced once when the installed version crosses each entry's `version`. `whatsNew`: a short changelog line the agent relays. `actions` (optional): recommended follow-ups as { kind, why, command } — the command PROPOSES each (propose -> ask -> run), never auto-runs. See README.md.

migrations.whatsNew: shroom now nudges you to set up if you haven't, suggests updates when a newer version ships, lets you clean up old recordings (and keep a downloadable MP4), has a polished player with clickable chapters and copy-to-embed, a local library dashboard, and transcript search.
